message.content:
Read these files thoroughly and provide a detailed analysis of the design patterns, structure, spacing, typography, component styles, and overall design philosophy. I need EVERY detail about how pages are structured, what CSS properties are used, how cards/inputs/buttons/labels look, the color system, spacing system, animation patterns, and any other design tokens.

Read these files:
1. /Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/k3rn-platform/K3RN.LABS CONCEPTION/brand_design/brand_book.html
2. /Users/user/Desktop/K3rn.labas_test/k3rn-platform/K3RN.LABS CONCEPTION/brand_design/k3rn.labs_ui_design_system_canonical.md

Provide a comprehensive summary of:
- Page structure (layout, wrapper, main content area)
- Typography hierarchy (h1, h2, labels, body text - exact sizes, weights, colors, tracking)
- Card specs (background, border, radius, padding, shadows)
- Input field specs (background, border, radius, padding, focus states, placeholder style)
- Button specs (primary, secondary - all states)
- Label specs
- Color system (all CSS custom properties)
- Spacing system
- Animation patterns
- Any other design tokens or patterns

content.content:
1→# 🎨 K3RN.LABS - Brand & Design Repository
     2→
     3→Ce dossier contient **l'unique source de vérité** pour l'identité visuelle et l'UI de K3RN.LABS.
     4→
     5→## 🏆 Hiérarchie des Documents
     6→
     7→1.  **`brand_book.html` (SOURCE DE VÉRITÉ ABSOLUE)**  
     8→    C'est la référence visuelle et interactive définitive. Si un doute subsiste, c'est ce fichier qui fait foi. Il contient le rendu exact des couleurs, des ombres (`shadow-glow`), des arrondis (`radius-2xl`), et des typographies (`Inter`).
     9→    > **Usage** : À ouvrir dans un navigateur pour visualiser le rendu final attendu.
    10→
    11→2.  **`k3rn.labs_ui_design_system_canonical.md` (RÉFÉRENCE TECHNIQUE)**  
    12→    C'est la traduction technique du Brand Book HTML. Il liste les tokens (variables CSS, valeurs HEX, règles d'espacement) que les développeurs doivent implémenter. Il est strictement aligné sur le HTML.
    13→    > **Usage** : À utiliser par les développeurs pour configurer `globals.css` et `tailwind.config.js`.
    14→
    15→3.  **`logo_k3rb.labs/` (ACTIFS GRAPHIQUES)**  
    16→    Contient les fichiers sources du logo (SVG, PNG).
    17→    > **Note** : Le logo officiel pour le header est la version **icon-only white** (`logo_04.svg`).
    18→
    19→---
    20→
    21→## 🚀 Guide d'Implémentation
    22→
    23→### Pour les Développeurs
    24→*   **Ne jamais inventer de valeurs.** Utilisez uniquement les tokens définis dans le `.md`.
    25→*   **Respectez le "Modern Rounded".** Les cartes ont un arrondi de **24px** (`radius-2xl`), pas moins.
    26→*   **Typography**. La font est `Inter`. Les titres Hero sont en `Light (300)`.
    27→
    28→### Pour les Designers
    29→*   Référez-vous au `brand_book.html` pour comprendre l'ambiance "Dark Mode" et l'usage précis de l'accent Orange (`#F75105`).
    30→*   L'interface est minimaliste, sombre, avec des touches de lumière (Glow) très ciblées.
    31→
    32→---
    33→*© 2026 K3RN.LABS - Design System*
    34→

<system-reminder>

content.text: Perfect! I now have all the detailed information. Let me search for any typography information I might have missed:

Excellent! I have collected all the information. Now let me compile a comprehensive analysis document.

---

## K3RN.LABS Design System - Comprehensive Analysis

Based on a thorough examination of the `brand_book.html` file, here is a complete breakdown of the K3RN.LABS design system:

### PAGE STRUCTURE & LAYOUT

**Container & Wrapper:**
- `.container` class with `max-width: 1400px`
- Centered with `margin: 0 auto`
- Horizontal padding of `var(--space-8)` (32px / 2rem)
- Full viewport height sections with `padding: var(--space-20) 0` (80px top/bottom)

**Page Sections:**
- Header with sticky navigation
- Hero section with full-width layout
- Multiple content sections with consistent spacing
- Cards and component demos
- Footer section

---

### TYPOGRAPHY SYSTEM

**Font Family:** `Inter` (fallback: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif)
- Base line-height: 1.5
- Font smoothing enabled: `-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased`

**Typography Classes:**

| Class | Font Size | Font Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Use Case |
|-------|-----------|-------------|-------------|-----------------|----------|
| `.h1` | 4rem (64px) | 700 | 1.1 | -0.02em | Primary headings |
| `.h2` | 3rem (48px) | 600 | 1.2 | -0.01em | Section headings |
| `.h3` | 2rem (32px) | 600 | 1.3 | 0 | Sub-headings |
| `.h4` | 1.5rem (24px) | 600 | 1.4 | 0 | Card titles |
| `.body-lg` | 1.125rem (18px) | Normal | 1.7 | 0 | Large body text |
| `.body` | 1rem (16px) | Normal | 1.6 | 0 | Standard body text |
| `.body-sm` | 0.875rem (14px) | Normal | 1.5 | 0 | Small body text |
| `.caption` | 0.75rem (12px) | Normal | 1.4 | 0.02em | Captions & labels |

**Additional Typography Details:**
- Hero section h1: 5.5rem (88px), font-weight 300 (Light), line-height 1
- Section titles: 3rem, font-weight 300 (Light), letter-spacing 0.05em
- Component titles: 1.25rem, font-weight 600
- Section numbers: 0.75rem, font-weight 700, text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing 0.1em

---

### COLOR SYSTEM (CSS Custom Properties)

**Brand Colors:**
- `--brand-primary: #F75105` (Vibrant Orange - primary accent)
- `--brand-secondary: #F78E21` (Lighter Orange - hover state)

**Neutral Scale:**
- `--neutral-darkest: #000000` (Pure black)
- `--neutral-dark-900: #22242B` (Very dark gray)
- `--neutral-dark-800: #2F323A` (Dark gray)
- `--neutral-dark-700: #5D5C5B` (Medium dark gray)
- `--neutral-light-300: #D2D3D4` (Light gray)
- `--neutral-lightest: #FFFFFF` (Pure white)

**Background Colors:**
- `--bg-primary: #000000` (Main background - pure black)
- `--bg-secondary: #0F0F0F` (Secondary background - almost black)
- `--bg-card: #1A1A1A` (Card background - dark gray)
- `--bg-card-hover: #22242B` (Card hover state - slightly lighter)

**Text Colors:**
- `--text-primary: #FAFAFA` (Nearly white - main text)
- `--text-secondary: #A1A1AA` (Medium gray - secondary text)
- `--text-muted: #71717A` (Darker gray - muted text)

**Border Colors:**
- `--border-subtle: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)` (Very subtle border)
- `--border-default: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)` (Standard border)
- `--border-strong: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)` (Strong/prominent border)

---

### SPACING SYSTEM

**Base Unit:** 4px (0.25rem)
**Scale:** Based on 4px increments

| Token | Value (rem) | Value (px) | Use Case |
|-------|------------|-----------|----------|
| `--space-1` | 0.25rem | 4px | Minimal gaps |
| `--space-2` | 0.5rem | 8px | Icon gaps, tight spacing |
| `--space-3` | 0.75rem | 12px | Component padding |
| `--space-4` | 1rem | 16px | Standard padding |
| `--space-6` | 1.5rem | 24px | Section gaps, card padding |
| `--space-8` | 2rem | 32px | Container padding, large gaps |
| `--space-12` | 3rem | 48px | Section margins, major spacing |
| `--space-16` | 4rem | 64px | Large section spacing |
| `--space-20` | 5rem | 80px | Hero/section padding |

---

### BORDER RADIUS SYSTEM

| Token | Value (rem) | Value (px) | Use Case |
|-------|------------|-----------|----------|
| `--radius-sm` | 0.375rem | 6px | Small elements, buttons |
| `--radius-md` | 0.5rem | 8px | Input fields, standard buttons |
| `--radius-lg` | 0.75rem | 12px | Code blocks, secondary cards |
| `--radius-xl` | 1rem | 16px | Larger cards |
| `--radius-2xl` | 1.5rem | 24px | **Main cards & containers** |
| `--radius-full` | 9999px | Circle | Circular elements |

**Design Philosophy:** "Modern Rounded" aesthetic with primary emphasis on 24px (radius-2xl) for main card containers.

---

### SHADOW SYSTEM

| Token | CSS Value | Use Case |
|-------|-----------|----------|
| `--shadow-sm` | `0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05)` | Subtle elevation |
| `--shadow-md` | `0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3)` | Standard elevation |
| `--shadow-lg` | `0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4)` | Strong elevation |
| `--shadow-glow` | `0 0 30px rgba(247, 81, 5, 0.3)` | **Orange glow effect** - used on hover states and active elements |

**Glow Shadow Details:** 30px blur radius with 30% orange opacity - creates a distinct glowing halo effect unique to K3RN.LABS branding.

---

### BUTTON SPECIFICATIONS

**Base Button (`.btn`):**
- Display: inline-flex
- Align items: center
- Gap between elements: `var(--space-2)` (8px)
- Padding: `var(--space-3) var(--space-6)` (12px vertical, 24px horizontal)
- Font size: 0.875rem (14px)
- Font weight: 600 (Semibold)
- Border radius: `var(--radius-md)` (8px)
- Border: none
- Cursor: pointer
- Transition: all 0.2s
- Font family: Inter, sans-serif
- Text decoration: none

**Primary Button (`.btn-primary`):**
- Background: `var(--brand-primary)` (#F75105)
- Text color: white
- Hover state:
  - Background: `var(--brand-secondary)` (#F78E21)
  - Box shadow: `var(--shadow-glow)` (orange glow)
  - Transform: `translateY(-1px)` (subtle lift effect)

**Secondary Button (`.btn-secondary`):**
- Background: transparent
- Text color: `var(--text-primary)` (#FAFAFA)
- Border: 1px solid `var(--border-default)` (white 10% opacity)
- Hover state:
  - Background: `var(--bg-card)` (#1A1A1A)
  - Border color: `var(--border-strong)` (white 20% opacity)

**Large Button (`.btn-lg`):**
- Padding: `var(--space-4) var(--space-8)` (16px vertical, 32px horizontal)
- Font size: 1rem (16px)

---

### CARD SPECIFICATIONS

**Base Card (`.card`):**
- Background: `var(--bg-card)` (#1A1A1A)
- Border: 1px solid `var(--border-default)` (rgba 255,255,255, 0.1)
- Border radius: `var(--radius-2xl)` (24px) - **prominent rounded corners**
- Padding: `var(--space-8)` (32px)
- Transition: all 0.3s ease

**Card Hover State:**
- Border color: `var(--border-strong)` (rgba 255,255,255, 0.2)
- Background: `var(--bg-card-hover)` (#22242B - slightly lighter)
- Smooth transition effect

**Card Typography:**
- Card title: 1.25rem, font-weight 600
- Card description: 0.875rem, color `var(--text-secondary)`, line-height 1.6

---

### INPUT FIELD SPECIFICATIONS

**Base Input (`.input`):**
- Width: 100%
- Padding: `var(--space-3) var(--space-4)` (12px vertical, 16px horizontal)
- Background: `var(--bg-secondary)` (#0F0F0F)
- Border: 1px solid `var(--border-default)` (white 10% opacity)
- Border radius: `var(--radius-md)` (8px)
- Color: `var(--text-primary)` (#FAFAFA)
- Font size: 0.875rem (14px)
- Font family: Inter, sans-serif
- Transition: all 0.2s

**Input Focus State:**
- Outline: none (removed default)
- Border color: `var(--brand-primary)` (#F75105)
- Box shadow: `0 0 0 3px rgba(247, 81, 5, 0.1)` (orange glow ring at 10% opacity)

**Input Placeholder:**
- Color: `var(--text-muted)` (#71717A)

---

### GRID SYSTEM

**Base Grid (`.grid`):**
- Display: grid
- Gap: `var(--space-6)` (24px)

**Responsive Grid Options:**
- `.grid-2`: `grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr)`
- `.grid-3`: `grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr)`
- `.grid-4`: `grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr)`

**Responsive Breakpoint (max-width: 1024px):**
- All grids collapse to single column: `grid-template-columns: 1fr`

---

### ANIMATION & TRANSITION PATTERNS

**Button Transitions:**
- Hover: `all 0.2s` (quick, snappy)
- Transform: `translateY(-1px)` (subtle upward lift)

**Card Transitions:**
- Hover: `all 0.3s ease` (smooth, slightly longer)

**Glow Effect:**
- `box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow)` creates orange halo
- Applied to `.btn-primary:hover`
- Creates visual feedback and brand presence

**Navigation:**
- Smooth scroll behavior implemented
- Active nav states tracked on scroll with CSS class `.active`
- Nav link active indicator: `::after` pseudo-element with orange accent

---

### DESIGN TOKENS SUMMARY TABLE

| Category | Token | Value | Notes |
|----------|-------|-------|-------|
| **Colors** | brand-primary | #F75105 | Orange accent |
| | brand-secondary | #F78E21 | Hover state |
| | bg-primary | #000000 | Pure black background |
| | bg-secondary | #0F0F0F | Slightly lighter black |
| | bg-card | #1A1A1A | Card containers |
| | text-primary | #FAFAFA | Main text |
| | text-secondary | #A1A1AA | Secondary text |
| | text-muted | #71717A | Muted text |
| **Spacing** | space-1 to space-20 | 4px - 80px | 4px base unit |
| **Radius** | radius-sm to radius-full | 6px - 9999px | radius-2xl (24px) primary |
| **Shadows** | shadow-sm to shadow-glow | Various | Glow is orange (0.3 opacity) |
| **Typography** | Inter font | Multiple scales | Light (300) to Bold (700) |

---

### OVERALL DESIGN PHILOSOPHY

**Aesthetic:** Dark mode, modern, minimalist with tech-forward sensibility

**Key Characteristics:**
1. **Extreme Dark Mode:** Pure black (#000000) with subtle grayscale hierarchy
2. **Orange Accent Strategy:** Single vibrant orange (#F75105) used as primary call-to-action and active states
3. **Modern Rounded:** 24px border radius on main containers for contemporary feel
4. **Generous Spacing:** 4px-based system encourages breathing room and clarity
5. **Smooth Interactions:** 0.2s-0.3s transitions for responsive, polished feel
6. **Glow Effects:** Signature orange glow shadow creates premium, high-tech visual feedback
7. **Hierarchy Through Contrast:** Text colors range from white (#FAFAFA) to muted gray (#71717A)
8. **Subtle Borders:** Use of white at 5-20% opacity for soft borders that don't compete
9. **Clean Typography:** Inter font with specific weight/size combinations for clear information architecture
10. **Accessibility Focus:** Minimum 14px font, 44x44px touch targets, 4.5:1 contrast ratios

**Implementation Principle:** "Never invent values" - all design decisions are token-based CSS custom properties, ensuring consistency across all projects.

---

This design system represents a cohesive, modern brand identity with strong emphasis on dark elegance, clear hierarchy, and tech-forward aesthetic through strategic use of orange accents and contemporary spacing/radius choices.
